calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-08-2009 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-27-2009 Continued To Jun-22-09 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar May-05-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Brett A. Pedersen, Esq. appeared for plaintiff University of San Francisco.
Raymond Rogers, the Student Loan Coordinator for plaintiff, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Lambridgedo Newton.
Default was entered against defendant on January 30, 2009. Amended Default was entered against defendant on February 27, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff University of San Francisco, and against the Defaulted Defendant Lambridgedo Newton as follows:

Damages/Principal - $18,037.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $9,984.16.
Attorney's Fees - $2,669.00.
Costs - $832.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $31,522.16.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
